title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: grub2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for grub2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The grub2 packages provide version 2 of the Grand Unified Boot Loader (GRUB), a highly configurable and customizable boot loader with modular architecture. The packages support a variety of kernel formats, file systems, computer architectures, and hardware devices.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Sorting of BLS snippets by file name is broken on RHEL8 (JIRA:RHEL-112099)  grub2-mkconfig is never run on kernel upgrade if GRUB_ENABLE_BLSCFG=false (JIRA:RHEL-113830)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64

fixes.description: grub2-mkconfig is never run on kernel upgrade if GRUB_ENABLE_BLSCFG=false

full_text:
An update for grub2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The grub2 packages provide version 2 of the Grand Unified Boot Loader (GRUB), a highly configurable and customizable boot loader with modular architecture. The packages support a variety of kernel formats, file systems, computer architectures, and hardware devices.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Sorting of BLS snippets by file name is broken on RHEL8 (JIRA:RHEL-112099)  grub2-mkconfig is never run on kernel upgrade if GRUB_ENABLE_BLSCFG=false (JIRA:RHEL-113830)
